description_long: This object is a large, block-shaped piece of cheese with a pale yellow color and a smooth, matte surface. The cheese is decorated with a regular pattern of slightly darker and lighter square patches, giving it a stylized, almost pixelated appearance. The block is uniform in shape, with straight, clean edges and flat faces, suggesting it has been precisely cut. There are no visible holes, cracks, or signs of aging, and the surface appears to be free of any rind or wax coating. The cheese's size and shape are reminiscent of a large catering or display block, suitable for slicing or serving in an urban food market or event. Its overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, making it stand out as a decorative or functional food item.
description: A large, pale yellow block of cheese with a smooth, matte surface and a pattern of square patches. The cheese is uniform, clean-edged, and lacks any visible rind or holes.
description_view_0: The front face shows a flat, pale yellow surface with a regular pattern of square patches in slightly different shades.
description_view_1: This side displays a similar pattern of square patches, but the arrangement and density of the patches differ slightly from the front.
description_view_2: The face here is nearly identical to the others, with the same pale yellow color and square patch pattern, but the distribution of patches is unique to this side.
description_view_3: This view shows another flat face with the same color and patch pattern, with subtle differences in the placement of the squares.
